name: Presentation
description: Player-facing surfaces (manuscript, codex, PN) contain no spoilers or internal plumbing. All visible text respects spoiler hygiene and uses in-world language.

rubric.instructions: Evaluate spoiler hygiene and presentation cleanliness. Player surfaces must reveal no internals, no spoilers, and no meta-content.

criteria.name: spoiler_hygiene
criteria.description: No twists, secrets, or backstory revealed prematurely. Canon stays hidden from player surface.

criteria.name: no_internals
criteria.description: No codewords, flag IDs, state names, seeds, models, or DAW notes visible on player surfaces.

good: All mechanics hidden behind in-world phrasing

criteria.name: diegetic_phrasing
criteria.description: PN lines use in-world wording. Choices are clear without being meta. Diegetic transit present on anchor jumps.

good: If the foreman vouched for you, proceed...

failure_guidance: Move spoilers from codex to canon notes; keep player-safe summaries only. Rephrase PN lines to diegetic checks. Replace internal labels with player-safe refs or in-world terms. Add narrative transitions for anchor jumps.
